title: Donoslane Excursions
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Quote|If you're on Corellia and you want the best shuttles, the best pilots, and the best prices, who do you comm?''"
"''Donoslane Excursions.|Kirney Slane and Voort saBinring, reciting the Donoslane Excursions advertisement|''[[X-Wing: Mercy Kill]]''}} '''Donoslane Excursions''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] company founded by [[Myn Donos]] and Kirney Slane,''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' born "[[Gara Petothel]]" and also known as "Lara Notsil."''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' Donoslane leased a section of [[Behareh Spaceport]] in [[Coronet/Legends|Coronet]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. The co-pilot aboard the manager's personal [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] was a [[Ewok/Legends|short, furry alien]].''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' In [[44 ABY]], Kirney Slane used one of Donoslane's shuttles to rescue [[Wraith Squadron]] from [[Vandor-3]]. ==Behind the scenes== Although never made explicit in the novel, Donoslane takes its name from [[Myn Donos]] and [[Gara Petothel|Kirney Slane]], an alias [[Gara Petothel]] took after the destruction of the [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']], who author [[Aaron Allston]] has said got together after the events of ''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''. The co-pilot of Kirney's shuttle, however, is obviously meant to be [[Kolot]]. Allston's implication regarding the ownership of the company was finally explicitly canonized in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', though Kolot's presence remains a mere implication. ==Appearances== *''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}} *''[[X-Wing: Mercy Kill]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Mercy Kill (audiobook)}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Corellian organizations]] [[Category:Spaceport companies]]
